hypotheses.title: Mn Speciation as Unifying Framework for Neurotoxicity
hypotheses.novelty_note: Michalke group published Mn speciation-neurotoxicity framework since 2006 (PMIDs 16765446, 21940818, 24200516, 27006066). Deinococcus cross-kingdom bridge IS novel but core speciation concept is established. Reclassified from PASS to CONDITIONAL_PASS.

hypotheses.title: EPR Free Mn2+ Fraction as Diagnostic Biomarker
hypotheses.novelty_note: EPR for clinical Mn speciation is novel. Sensitivity concern: blood Mn ~70-275 nM vs EPR detection ~1 uM. MRI T1 and MnRBCs are competing approaches.

hypotheses.title: Compartment-Specific Mn-OP Formation in Mitochondria
hypotheses.novelty_note: Quantitatively weakened: mitochondrial Pi is 1-5 mM (not 10 mM), Ca2+/Mg2+ competition, MnSOD already explains protection. Downgraded from 7 to 6.

hypotheses.title: Irving-Williams Framework for Metal-Specific Neurotoxicity
hypotheses.novelty_note: Gemini CORRECTED: verbal formulation inverted. Cu has sharpest threshold (high Ka); Mn has gradual response (low Ka).

hypotheses.title: His-Glu Small-Molecule for Welding Fume Disease
hypotheses.kill_reason: Ka ~ 670 M-1 insufficient at brain Mn concentrations

hypotheses.title: DP1 Motif in Human Proteins
hypotheses.kill_reason: DEH motif ubiquitous; binds Cu better than Mn; base rate neglect

hypotheses.title: Mn-OP Potentiates MnTE-2-PyP
hypotheses.kill_reason: DIRECTLY CONTRADICTED: Gad 2013 (PMID 23704100) shows no measurable free Mn released from MnTE-2-PyP. Solves non-existent problem.

hypotheses.title: Mn Speciation x Ferroptosis
hypotheses.kill_reason: Double kill: (1) Mn-ferroptosis published in 5+ papers 2022-2024; (2) Mn2+ Fenton ineffective - actual mechanism is iron overload

hypotheses.title: Mn Speciation x alpha-Synuclein Aggregation
hypotheses.kill_reason: NAC domain dominance; clinical mismatch manganism vs PD

post_critique_revision_note: External critic found prior work on Mn speciation neurotoxicology (Michalke 2006-2016). C2-H1 downgraded from PASS to CONDITIONAL_PASS. C2-H4 and C2-H6 kills strengthened with specific PMIDs. C2-H2 downgraded from 7 to 6.
